quips.quote: Not all who wander are lost.
quips.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quips.quote: Not until we are lost do we begin to understand ourselves.
quips.author: Henry David Thoreau

quips.quote: I have never been lost, but I will admit to being confused for several weeks.
quips.author: Daniel Boone

quips.quote: Alice: Would you tell me, please, which way I ought to go from here? The Cheshire Cat: That depends a good deal on where you want to get to. Alice: I don't much care where. The Cheshire Cat: Then it doesn't much matter which way you go. Alice: ...So long as I get somewhere. The Cheshire Cat: Oh, you're sure to do that, if only you walk long enough.
quips.author: Lewis Carroll

quips.quote: We must be willing to let go of the life we have planned, so as to have the life that is waiting for us.
quips.author: Joseph Campbell

quips.quote: You got to go down a lot of wrong roads to find the right one.
quips.author: Bob Parsons

quips.quote: The soul which has no fixed purpose in life is lost; to be everywhere, is to be nowhere.
quips.author: Michel de Montaigne

quips.quote: Every one goes astray, but the least imprudent are they who repent the soonest.
quips.author: Voltaire

quips.quote: I lost some time once. It's always in the last place you look for it.
quips.author: Neil Gaiman
